observable_oracle: A session-worktree applied-index event advances only the hidden lifetime consumer while rootFolders and file view-model indexes remain empty and visible-root generation counters are unchanged.
notes: hidden session-root projection isolation without synthetic UI trees

observable_oracle: Removing a present codemap or explicitly clearing an empty codemap set disables auto mode, while removing a nonmember leaves auto enabled.
failure_risk: Explicit user opt-out could be ignored or an unrelated no-op could disable automatic codemap selection.
notes: Item 1 UI-state regression coverage for explicit manual opt-out boundaries

observable_oracle: Removing an ordinary selected file keeps auto mode enabled, while the public full-clear flow empties selections and restores auto mode.
failure_risk: Ordinary selection churn could accidentally opt out of automatic codemaps or a full clear could leave the tab stuck in manual mode.
notes: Item 1 UI-state regression coverage for ordinary removal and clear reset

observable_oracle: Visible UI auto recomputation selects only the visible dependency, excludes the hidden session-worktree dependency, preserves the selected slice, and leaves manual mode unchanged on flush.
failure_risk: Hidden physical roots could leak into visible selection or recomputation could overwrite slices and explicit manual opt-out.
notes: Blocking review regression for visible-scope auto-codemap recomputation

observable_oracle: Selection paths round-trip through a worktree projection, and logical/physical aliases that collapse to one identity union their slice ranges without narrowing.
notes: read-file rebasing path-identity and alias-collision coverage

observable_oracle: Canonical auto-codemap paths recompute for full and sliced selection, explicit removal enters durable manual mode across add and destructive set, and ordinary removal preserves auto mode.
failure_risk: Selection mutation could silently re-enable manual opt-out, re-add explicitly removed codemaps, or disable auto on ordinary removal.
notes: Renamed from testAutoCodemapInvariantAcrossSelectionMutationsAndClearReset after review; actual full-clear behavior remains covered by WorkspaceFilesAutoCodemapModeTests

observable_oracle: No-op add and remove report mutation when canonical auto-codemaps refresh from stale state, while already-fresh repetitions remain non-mutating.
failure_risk: Callers that persist only mutated results could discard refreshed canonical auto-codemaps, or persist true no-ops unnecessarily.

observable_oracle: Session-bound recomputation emits only the in-scope unselected dependency once, excludes a selected dependency, and omits the foreign worktree dependency.
failure_risk: Canonical auto-codemaps could leak across bound worktrees, duplicate paths, or redundantly include selected full-content files.

observable_oracle: A bound worktree keeps canonical selection across one-shot connections and watcher ingress makes a shell-created file immediately visible to context-lines content search.
notes: expanded for shell-created worktree file visibility through owned watcher ingress
